meta_title: For Freelancers: passive income to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Passive Income to Solve Project Stall
content.seo_description: Stop project stalling. Learn how to generate passive income using Antigravity and Claude Code as a freelancer. Master the ship-fast workflow today.
content.answer_block: The root of project fatigue is manual maintenance and lack of recurring value. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for automated iteration, you can transition from one-off client work to automated, passive-income-generating SaaS products, ensuring your projects reach completion while building long-term recurring revenue streams.
content.intro:
The graveyard of unfinished projects is littered with good intentions and broken momentum. You start with a vision of a sleek SaaS, but by the third week, the feature creep sets in, the client demands shift, and your motivation evaporates into the ether. You aren't lacking talent; you are lacking a system that forces completion.

Imagine a workflow where the heavy lifting is handled by agents, and your role shifts from 'code monkey' to 'product architect.' We are going to bypass the burnout by automating the build phase, allowing you to ship micro-SaaS products that generate passive income while you sleep. It is time to stop trading hours for dollars and start building assets that work for you.

steps.title: Define the Micro-SaaS Scope
steps.description: Identify a small, high-value problem that can be solved in under 48 hours. Focus on utility over complexity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a Senior Product Manager. Draft a PRD for a B2B micro-SaaS tool that solves [Insert Problem] using a subscription model. Include core features, database schema, and monetization strategy.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Generate a project roadmap for a [Insert Tool Name] and list the top 3 essential features for an MVP.'

steps.title: Scaffold the Infrastructure
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the boilerplate, saving hours of configuration time.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a full-stack Next.js boilerplate with Supabase integration, Stripe subscription handling, and Tailwind CSS styling.

steps.title: Automate Core Logic
steps.description: Implement the core value proposition using Claude Code's ability to write production-ready functions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a robust server-side function to handle user authentication and Stripe webhooks for subscription management.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Create a stripe-webhook.ts file in /api/webhooks that updates user subscription status in Supabase database.'

steps.title: Build the Passive Revenue Stream
steps.description: Integrate automated email sequences and usage tracking to ensure the tool provides value without manual intervention.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an automated onboarding flow using Resend that triggers after a successful Stripe payment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'Add an email notification service that triggers on subscription confirmation using the Resend API.'

steps.title: Deploy and Iterate
steps.description: Deploy to Vercel and set up automated monitoring to ensure the 'passive' nature of the product remains stable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Vercel deployment configuration and a CI/CD pipeline script for automated testing on push.

pro_tips: Always build for the 'unhappy path' first; if the payment fails or the user cancels, the system should handle it automatically without manual intervention.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your database queries; if your data layer breaks, your passive income stops.
Focus on 'One-Click' deployment configurations; if you can't ship a patch in under 5 minutes, your project is too coupled.
Implement feature flags to test new monetization models without deploying new code to the entire user base.
Treat your SaaS as a 'productized service'—if it requires more than 1 hour of maintenance per week, refactor the process.
content.next_steps: After completing your first MVP, focus on SEO and cold-outreach to your first 10 users to validate the recurring revenue model before scaling.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the blueprint, and the mindset to stop stalling and start earning. Don't let another project sit in your repository gathering dust. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
